MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-10-2014 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Complaint Of Pltf For Failure To Provide Verified Answers To Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection Pursuant To Court Order;
Off Calendar May-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Plaintiff moving party
William P. O'Kelley, Esq. of Richardson, Fair & Cohen, for Rebecca Culp, Defendant and moving party through Court Call.
No other appearances on the matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT REBECCA CULP's Motion To Dismiss Complaint Of Plaintiff For Failure To Provide Verified Answers To Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection Pursuant To Court Order is Granted, no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Mtn To Compel Pltf To Respond To Demand For Inspection And For Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. WILLIAM P. O'KELLY OF THE LAW FIRM OF RICHARDSON, FAIR & COHEN, TEL. NO. (818) 562-8880 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT REBECCA CULP's motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond To Demand For Inspection And For Monetary Sanction IS GRANTED: No opposition filed; Sanctions of $125 imposed against Plaintiff. Plaintiff to provide responses to Request for Production, Set No. 1 within 20 days of notice of entry of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not Reported. =302/JPT

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT REBECCA CULP's motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond To Interogg And For Monetary Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Sanctions of $125 imposed against Plaintiff. Plaintiff to provide responses to Form Interrogatories, Set No. 1 within 20 days of notice of entry of this order.
